zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期横盘震荡，谨慎观望
zh.content:
当前艾达币价格位于$0.2458$附近，较昨日微跌0.11%，呈现轻微下行压力。从K线结构来看，短期内价格在$0.2452$至$0.2467$区间波动，显示出市场多空力量相对均衡，短线趋势仍偏横盘整理。  

技术指标方面，SMA(20)位于$0.2467$，价格略低于均线，说明短期略受均线压制；MACD为负值$-0.000585$，但信号线未提供参考，暗示动能略弱，多空仍无明确优势。RSI未提供，但从价格区间来看，超买超卖信号尚未明显。  

支撑位主要关注$0.2452$，若跌破该位置，可能引发短线回调至$0.2445$附近；阻力位在$0.2467$附近，突破后有望测试$0.2475$。投资者应关注价格对均线的反应，以及区间震荡的延续情况。  

交易策略上，短线可采取区间内低吸高抛，严格止损管理；中长线投资者应等待价格突破$0.2467$阻力确认趋势，再考虑加仓。整体来看，市场仍偏观望，谨慎操作为宜。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is trading almost flat at 0.245832, with a modest 24-hour decline of 0.11%. Price remains slightly below the SMA(20) at 0.24672585, suggesting short-term momentum is still mildly bearish. The narrow high-low range indicates low volatility and limited conviction, with buyers and sellers currently balanced near the lower end of the session range.

The MACD reading of -0.00058521709 points to weak downside momentum, though the lack of signal-line data limits confirmation. RSI(14) is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed directly. Still, price trading below the 20-period average implies ADA needs a recovery above 0.2467 to improve its short-term technical tone.

Immediate support sits near 0.245205, the recent low. A break below that level could expose ADA to further downside toward 0.2440–0.2435. Resistance is located around 0.246732, followed by the SMA(20) zone near 0.2467–0.2470. A clean move above this area would suggest buyers are regaining control.

Traders may consider waiting for confirmation rather than entering inside the current tight range. A bullish setup improves above 0.2470, ideally with stronger volume. Conversely, failure to hold 0.2452 could favor short-term bearish continuation. Risk management is important, as current volatility is compressed and may precede a sharper breakout.
